note: Reference values from empirical data. NOT enforced thresholds — AgentLint measures and compares, users decide.

NEVER.source: Anthropic 265 versions: 4→1 (we use 4 as comfortable upper bound)

I2_density.source: Anthropic: 7.5→1.4. We use 2.0 as comfortable reference point.

I3_formula_ratio.unit: fraction of rules with anti-pattern + reason

label: lean
typical
I6_length.source: Anthropic: 15K-22K tokens (~200-400 lines). Codified Context: 660 lines. Most effective: concise with pointers.

C1_freshness_days.unit: days since entry file modified while code changed
C1_freshness_days.source: Codified Context: stale content is #1 failure mode

label: lean
comprehensive
I8_total_lines.source: corpus-4533 analysis: median=116 lines; outliers exceed 600. IFScale: compliance degrades beyond ~150 instructions.
